title: Starry's Teto Music Discs
description: Minecraft is now truly Teto's Territory! Replaces all music discs with Teto Songs
body:
Do you like Kasane Teto?

Then this is the texture pack for you!

This texture pack changes all music discs into popular songs by Kasane Teto

NOTE: Because of the funky way that Music Discs are coded, some of these songs aren't really teto songs and are just covers, I hope to replaced them when I either find a short enough song or Mojang makes Music Discs make sense



Here is the list of songs and what disc they replace:

- 11 is replaced by "Brain Implosion Energy Drink" by "Flanger Moose" [PLACEHOLDER SONG]
- Creator Music Box is replaced by "Chug Jug With You" [PLACEHOLDER SONG]
- Mellohi is replaced by "The Pikmin Song" [PLACEHOLDER SONG]
- Lava Chicken is replaced by "Igaku" by "原口沙輔"
- Pigstep is replaced by "Tetoris" by "Hiiragi Magnetite"
- Stal is replaced by "Mesmerizer" by "32ki"
- Far is replaced by "Propaganda Pyre" by "Chromatic"
- Tears is replaced by "Headache" by "えいぷ"
- Creator is replaced by "Odochina" by "Atena"
- 13 is replaced by "REGRET ROCK" by "MonochroMenace"
- 5 is replaced by "YABABAINA" by "SatapanP"
- Cat is replaced by "CandyCookieChocolate" by "HALLO CEL"
- Chirp is replaced by "Mini Hen" by "原口沙輔"
- Strad is replaced by "Override" by "吉田夜世"
- Otherside is replaced by "Enma the Second" by "Yomitan Akane"
- Mall is replaced by "WILDCARD" by "KIRA"
- Relic is replaced by "Teto Territory" by "Oxi"
- Wait is replaced by "Triple Baka" by "LamazeP"
- Ward is replaced by "Ochame Kinou" (More commonly known as Fukkireta) by "LamazeP"
- Precipice is replaced by "Liar Dance" by "Masarada"
- Blocks is replaced by "Dizzy Paranoia Girl" by "KAT"

And now there are even more songs as optional replacement files! These are optional files bundled with the main pack that can replace the packaged songs. These songs include:

- Far can be replace by "Chimera" by "mitsu_akuma"
- Pigstep can be replace by "deadalive1999" by "suzumenome"
- Relic can be replaced by "Machine Love" by "JamieP"
- Wait can be replaced by "Song of the Eared Robot"/"Song of Robot's Ear" by "nwp8861"

A couple final notes: I don't use modrinth much as I can't click links normally on it and instead have to open it in a new tab. This means updates are likely to be released slower on here. If you notice any bugs please go to [the curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/starrys-teto-music-discs) to report it. Thank you!
